description: Start implementing season card logic - apply passive effects from season cards during game actions
steps: In src/utils/gameLogic.ts, create a helper function getPlayerSeasonCardEffects(state: GameState, playerId: string): SeasonCard[] that returns the season cards owned by a player.

Implement warUpgrade logic: In the initiateWarPhase or at the start of war resolution, iterate through all players and apply 'At start of War Phase' effects from their warUpgrade cards. Specifically: 'Way of the Shogun' (sp-way-of-the-shogun): +3 coins, 'Way of the Righteous' (sp-way-of-the-righteous): take 1 coin from each player with less honor, 'Way of Bushido' (su-way-of-bushido): +2 coins and +2 VP per different virtue owned, 'Way of Naginata' (su-way-of-naginata / au-way-of-naginata): placeholder (movement is UI-driven), 'Way of the Ashigaru' (su-way-of-the-ashigaru): placeholder (province selection is UI-driven), 'Way of the Ronin' (su-way-of-the-ronin): +2 ronin, 'Way of the Katana' (au-way-of-the-katana): mark bushi as force 2 (store a flag or handle in calculateForce), 'Way of the Keiri' (au-way-of-the-keiri): placeholder (requires province selection), 'Way of the Moneylender' (au-way-of-the-moneylender): +5 coins.

Enhance calculateForce function to account for season card effects that modify force: 'Path of the Lion' (sp-path-of-the-lion): Daimyo +1 force, 'Path of the Dragon' (au-path-of-the-dragon): Daimyo +3 force, 'Path of the Favored' (su-path-of-the-favored): Shinto counts as Force 3 in provinces where owner has highest honor, 'Way of the Katana' (au-way-of-the-katana): all bushi have Force 2 during war. Modify calculateForce to accept the full GameState so it can check player cards.
Update all callers of calculateForce to pass the GameState parameter (executeHarvest, resolveNextBattle, and any other places it is called).
acceptance_criteria: War upgrade cards that grant coins/ronin/VP are applied at start of war phase in initiateWarPhase
calculateForce accounts for Daimyo force upgrades (Path of the Lion +1, Path of the Dragon +3)
All callers of calculateForce updated with new signature
Build passes with npx tsc -b && npx vite build
findings: Successfully implemented all season card logic. Created getPlayerSeasonCardEffects helper. Added applyWarUpgrades function that applies coins/ronin/VP effects at war phase start (Way of the Shogun +3 coins, Way of the Righteous takes coins from less honorable, Way of Bushido +2 coins + VP per virtue, Way of the Ronin +2 ronin, Way of the Moneylender +5 coins, plus placeholders for UI-driven cards). Enhanced calculateForce with optional GameState parameter to support Path of the Lion (Daimyo +1), Path of the Dragon (Daimyo +3), Path of the Favored (Shinto force 3 if highest honor), and Way of the Katana (Bushi force 2 during war). Updated all 7 callers of calculateForce with the new signature. Build passes cleanly.
